method: Per-stage cumulative FGA sigmoid over the 4 AJCC stages (domain_crc_v2.py, ANALYSIS 2)
interpretation: MSI (mismatch-repair-deficient) tumours reach the genomic-damage inflection earlier along the stage/load axis than MSS.
note_population_vs_stage: Population-sorted FGA gives delta=+0.053 and within-stage mutation-count sorting gives +0.090; both are counting-sort artefacts (see crc_results_v2.json -> group_results). The canonical load-axis result is the stage-aggregated delta=-0.153.
reproduce: python3 domain_crc_v2.py   (needs pandas + scipy + numpy + matplotlib; reads tcga_crc_combined.csv in this folder; ANALYSIS 2 prints the stage-aggregated a_hat per group)
